violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Did not observe staff hand wash during inspection. *Staff received payments, washed dishes at dish pit and made several drinks orders.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wiping cloths left at surfaces throughout kitchen/prep area. *No sani bucket made/ready to use at time of inspection.--In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Scoop with handles laying in coffee powders.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Lemondae drink in refrigerator have experation of 7/1/26.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Sandwiches were not date marked. -Whipped cream cheese is not date marked.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Staff stated hands are typically washed at 3 compartment sink or in bathroom.--An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. -Observed staff wash, rinse then set dishes into drain racks without sanitize step.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Straws, cup lids, and coffee filters stored on floor below front counter. -Unopened case of cups stored on floor in dry storage room. -Case of plastic to-go cups on floor in dry storage.--Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Sample cups (used for oils) are not stored inverted and are directly on shelves.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Ice machine drains into hand sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -No paper towels available at kitchen hand sink.
